texts.label: text
texts.orig: Docling converts messy documents into structured data and simplifies downstream document and AI processing by detecting tables, formulas, reading order, OCR, and much more.
texts.text: Docling converts messy documents into structured data and simplifies downstream document and AI processing by detecting tables, formulas, reading order, OCR, and much more.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Install Docling as a Python library with your favorite package manager
texts.text: Install Docling as a Python library with your favorite package manager

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Import many document formats into a unified and structured Docling Document , including scanned pages via an OCR engine of your choice.
texts.text: Import many document formats into a unified and structured Docling Document , including scanned pages via an OCR engine of your choice.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Export a parsed document to formats that simplify processing and ingestion into AI, RAG, and agentic systems.
texts.text: Export a parsed document to formats that simplify processing and ingestion into AI, RAG, and agentic systems.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Extract document components and their properties from the Docling Document.
texts.text: Extract document components and their properties from the Docling Document.
